description: Waffle chart of 100 squares in a 10-by-10 grid, each square one percent of North Carolina schools in 2025: 29 navy squares for the 28.5 percent graded A or B, the rest grey for C or lower.

title.text: Schools earning an A or B Performance Grade, 2025
title.subtitle: A waffle makes one share countable: each square is 1 of 100 NC schools — 29 squares for the 28.5% graded A or B.

usermeta.source: Source: NCDPI public accountability data (School Performance Grades), 2025. Style-guide demo.
